That’s something EU lawmakers are finding out in real time, after the European Parliament’s ECON Committee approved a plan by the European Central Bank to launch a digital

entries.title: Dubai tops Asian crypto hubs, India isolates banks from crypto: Asia Express
entries.snippet: Japan's SBI Crypto shuts down 12th largest Bitcoin mining pool in the world, Russia gears up to launch digital ruble despite EU sanctions, and more: Asia Express.

entries.title: Nigel Farage failed to declare funding from crypto gambling figure convicted of fraud
entries.snippet: Farage already faces a parliamentary standards investigation over an undisclosed £5 million gift from Tether stakeholder Christopher Harborne.

entries.title: Revolut to delist USDT in August, citing regulatory and risk concerns
entries.snippet: Revolut notified some customers it will delist USDT after Aug. 31, with remaining holdings automatically converted into users’ base currency.

entries.title: Senator Gillibrand Seeks to Ban Trump, Elected Officials From Launching Meme Coins
entries.snippet: After President Trump disclosed over $1 billion in crypto-related earnings, Senator Kirsten Gillibrand is calling for a meme coin ban.

entries.title: StanChart joins ESMA's first MiCA register update since deadline
entries.snippet: ESMA publishes its first post-deadline MiCA register update, adding 37 crypto-asset service providers, including Standard Chartered and FalconX.

entries.title: Bank of Russia governor says 'everything is ready' for widespread use of digital ruble ahead of September rollout
entries.snippet: The central bank is also actively discussing the use of stablecoins for international settlements, but only to complement the digital ruble.

entries.title: Treasury Department Sanctions Over 130 ISIS-Affiliated Crypto Wallets on Tron
entries.snippet: More than 130 Tron wallets connected with a Central Asian ISIS affiliate were sanctioned by the U.S. government, with funds frozen by Tether.
entries.tweet_text: Treasury Department Sanctions Over 130 ISIS-Affiliated Crypto Wallets on Tron

entries.title: Securitize Begins Trading on NYSE as Tokenized Shares Land on Solana, Avalanche
entries.snippet: BlackRock-backed tokenization firm Securitize now has shares trading on the New York Stock Exchange—or via Solana and Avalanche.
entries.tweet_text: Securitize Begins Trading on NYSE as Tokenized Shares Land on Solana, Avalanche

entries.title: Infinite and Sardine launch two-way integration
entries.snippet: Infinite, the AI-native compliance and payments platform built for the stablecoin economy, and Sardine, the fraud, risk, and payments platform, today announced a two-way integration that combines Sardine's real-time fraud and risk intelligence with Infinite's AI-powered compliance platform and accou

entries.title: Standard Chartered Becomes First Global Bank to Offer Direct USDC Access to Institutions
entries.snippet: Standard Chartered is the first Global Systemically Important Bank authorized to let institutions mint and redeem Circle's USDC.
entries.tweet_text: @StanChart Becomes First Global Bank to Offer Direct USDC Access to Institutions

entries.title: Ondo Finance launches custodial tokenised securities in the US
entries.snippet: Ondo Finance today announced the first live solution of third-party tokenized U.S. securities operating entirely within the existing regulatory perimeter in the U.S., in partnership with Broadridge Financial Solutions Inc., (NYSE: BR) to provide full voting rights for tokenized equity holders.
entries.tweet_text: Ondo Finance launches custodial tokenised securities in the US

entries.title: Payward completes Reap acquisition
entries.snippet: Payward, a unified financial infrastructure platform advancing an open, global financial system, today announced the completion of its acquisition of Reap Technologies Holdings Limited (“Reap”), a leading stablecoin-native, card issuing and payments infrastructure company enabling global money movem
entries.tweet_text: Payward completes Reap acquisition

entries.title: Ondo tokenizes BlackRock's IVV ETF and Micron stock under US custodial model
entries.snippet: Ondo Finance launches tokenized BlackRock IVV ETF and Micron shares under SEC-defined custodial model with Ethereum-based settlement.
entries.tweet_text: Ondo tokenizes @BlackRock's IVV ETF and Micron stock under US custodial model

entries.title: OFAC sanctions 134 ISIS-K crypto wallet addresses as Tether freezes funds
entries.snippet: OFAC added 134 crypto wallet addresses linked to ISIS-K to its sanctions list, including 131 Tron addresses that received more than $1.4 million in crypto donations, according to Chainalysis.
entries.tweet_text: OFAC sanctions 134 ISIS-K crypto wallet addresses as @Tether_to freezes funds

entries.title: Standard Chartered, Circle bring USDC minting onto banking rails
entries.snippet: Standard Chartered and Circle launch bank-led USDC minting and redemption for institutions, starting in Dubai’s DIFC with planned global expansion.
entries.tweet_text: Standard Chartered, @circle bring USDC minting onto banking rails

entries.title: Bank of Korea governor outlines tokenized bond vision, unified ledger plan
entries.snippet: The Bank of Korea’s governor praised tokenized government bonds for easing the issuance and management of government debt during a panel discussion at the ECB Forum.

entries.title: Yield-bearing stablecoin slowdown ends 3-year run for crypto-native products
entries.snippet: Yield-bearing stablecoin supply fell 15% in Q2 as sUSDe and sUSDS contracted, while Treasury-backed products including BUIDL, USYC and USDY continued to grow.

entries.title: Caliber Advances Real Estate Fund Tokenization Strategy with Chainlink's Compliance and Distribution Infrastructure

entries.title: Morphic launches RGLTD for digital assets
entries.snippet: Morphic Financial Group, the London-based digital financial services group, today announces the launch of RGLTD and the expansion of its strategic partnership with Cashify, creating a new dual-brand operating structure designed to serve the evolving needs of Europe’s regulated digital asset market.

entries.title: Solana launches onchain governance and sets entry fee at 100,000 SOL staked
entries.tweet_text: Solana launches onchain governance and sets entry fee at 100,000 SOL staked

entries.title: NCI and DataExpert launch crypto compliance training programme
entries.snippet: The European Anti-Money Laundering Regulation (AMLR) will come into force on 10 July 2027, introducing stricter requirements for financial institutions, crypto-asset service providers (CASPs) and other regulated entities acting as financial gatekeepers

entries.title: Cloudflare Launches Monetization Gateway for Stablecoin Payments via x402
entries.snippet: Cloudflare Launches Monetization Gateway for Stablecoin Payments via x402 The Defiant

entries.title: Robinhood links with dYdX Labs to launch new DEX Arcus
entries.snippet: The crypto protocol dYdX has rebranded as Arcus and is joining Robinhood’s new blockchain to bring perpetual and tokenized stock trading.
entries.tweet_text: @RobinhoodApp links with dYdX Labs to launch new DEX Arcus

entries.title: Lightspark becomes first payments company in Estonia to get MiCA licence
entries.snippet: Today, Lightspark Payments Europe AS announced it received a crypto-asset service provider (CASP) authorization under the EU's Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCA), together with authorization to operate as an electronic money institution (EMI), from Estonia's Financial Supervision Authority (

entries.title: Bernstein sees 203% upside for Circle even as new stablecoin rival OUSD debuts
entries.snippet: Bernstein reaffirms Outperform on Circle with a $190 target after OUSD's launch sent CRCL stock down over 17%.

entries.title: Korea's unified ledger paper is silent on privacy. Central banks should take note
entries.snippet: In preparation for a talk at the ECB Forum today, the Bank of Korea published a paper on its unified ledger Project Hangang (Han River). It involves tokenized deposits from commercial banks, with interbank settlement using a wholesale CBDC. Seven banks participated in Phase I earlier this year, expa

entries.title: CRCL Sell-Off 'Looks Overdone' Say Analysts as Circle CEO Addresses Open USD Threat
entries.snippet: Analysts don't think the threat of a new stablecoin launch was enough to warrant a major Circle (CRCL) sell-off on Tuesday.

entries.title: Tradeweb executes real-time tokenized US Treasury transaction on Canton Network
entries.snippet: Franklin Templeton transferred a tokenized US Treasury to Virtu Financial in what Tradeweb said was the first real-time transaction settled against USDCx.
entries.tweet_text: Tradeweb executes real-time tokenized US Treasury transaction on Canton Network

entries.title: BitMine, Sharplink and Joe Lubin Accelerate Wall Street Ethereum Push With Nonprofit Launch
entries.snippet: Ethereum Institutional will serve as a point of contact for financial institutions seeking to get more involved with on-chain infrastructure.

entries.title: Solana-based prediction market app on Phantom wallet launches
entries.snippet: “Prediction markets are one of the most powerful applications you can build on a high-performance blockchain,” said Solana Foundation.

entries.title: Robinhood Chain goes live on mainnet alongside 24/7 tokenized stocks, Lighter perps and planned crypto agentic trading
entries.snippet: Robinhood Chain, a Layer 2 built using Arbitrum's tech stack, went live on public mainnet, with partners including Uniswap from day one.
entries.tweet_text: @RobinhoodApp Chain goes live on mainnet alongside 24/7 tokenized stocks, Lighter perps and planned crypto agentic trading

entries.title: Anchorage Digital brings off-exchange settlement to Binance
entries.snippet: The integration addresses one of the biggest obstacles keeping institutional capital on the sidelines of crypto markets: exchange counterparty risk.
entries.tweet_text: Anchorage Digital brings off-exchange settlement to @binance

entries.title: Nebeus receives MiCA CASP authorisation
entries.snippet: Nebeus has been authorised by Spain's CNMV as a Crypto-Asset Service Provider (CASP) under the EU's Markets in Crypto-Assets (MiCA) regulation, placing the Barcelona-based fintech among the first regulated firms able to passport digital asset services across the European Economic Area.

entries.title: Morning Minute: Major New Stablecoin Launch Shakes Incumbents
entries.snippet: Open USD takes a shot at USDC and USDT, with backing from heavy hitters including Visa, Mastercard and Google.
entries.tweet_text: Morning Minute: Major New Stablecoin Launch Shakes Incumbents

entries.title: Panther Hollow launches multi-strategy merchant bank focused on compliant RWA and yield strategies
entries.snippet: Panther is a hybrid merchant bank, fund complex, and incubator focused on Ethereum, Canton, Solana, and StarkNet.

entries.title: Symbiotic officially pivots to collateral markets with Core V2 launch
entries.snippet: Symbiotic now powers shared collateral infrastructure that can support multiple DeFi use cases like insurance, credit, and RWAs.

entries.title: Credit Agricole launches euro stablecoin
entries.snippet: French bank Credit Agricole has launched a euro-denominated stablecoin and subscribed to a tokenised Amundi money market fund (MMF), in what the bank has described as a European first.
entries.tweet_text: Credit Agricole launches euro stablecoin

entries.title: Small fraction of EU crypto groups hold licence as new rules come into force
entries.snippet: Stringent bloc-wide MiCA regulations push unlicensed digital-assets companies to offload customers

entries.title: Financial companies join forces for US dollar stablecoin, keeping reserve earnings
entries.snippet: The project, supported by Visa, Mastercard and many crypto companies, could be in a position to challenge Tether’s USDT and Circle’s USDC, currently the two largest stablecoins by market capitalization.
entries.tweet_text: Financial companies join forces for US dollar stablecoin, keeping reserve earnings

entries.title: Visa and Google Sign on to Use Money Movement Stablecoin OpenUSD
entries.snippet: Several of the world’s payments and tech giants have agreed to use the money movement stablecoin Open USD. That coin is set to go live later this year, according to an announcement Tuesday (June 30) from Open Standard, the company behind Open USD. It noted in a blog post that the launch is happening
entries.tweet_text: @Visa and Google Sign on to Use Money Movement Stablecoin OpenUSD

entries.title: Big payment names back new stablecoin
entries.snippet: Visa, Mastercard, US Bank, Google and Coinbase are among dozens of firms backing Open USD, a new stablecoin slated to launch later this year.
entries.tweet_text: Big payment names back new stablecoin

entries.title: Circle shares drop 13% after launch of new stablecoin Open USD backed by major banks and tech firms

entries.tweet_text: New York Life's $800 billion asset manager makes tokenization debut with Centrifuge fund

entries.title: ESMA MiCA warning puts Binance EU service changes under scrutiny
entries.snippet: ESMA said EU crypto clients must be served through a MiCA-authorized entity as Binance faces questions over its servicing model in the region after the MiCA deadline.
entries.tweet_text: ESMA MiCA warning puts @binance EU service changes under scrutiny

entries.title: UK Reduces Capital Requirements for Stablecoin Issuers
entries.snippet: The U.K. has introduced new digital asset regulations as part of its ongoing quest to become a cryptocurrency hub. The country’s Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) issued new rules Tuesday (June 30) for crypto companies, mandating they meet capital and stress testing requirements as well as market in
entries.tweet_text: UK Reduces Capital Requirements for Stablecoin Issuers

entries.title: MetaMask launches stablecoin yield account with card spending
entries.snippet: MetaMask launches Money Account it says offers up to 4% variable APY on mUSD stablecoin balances and card spending, with DeFi-powered yield via vaults, excluding the UK and EU.

entries.title: OKX AI unveils marketplace for agents to find work and get paid in stablecoins
entries.snippet: “Think Upwork for Agents with our fintech infrastructure and 150M scale in the background," an OKX rep said.

entries.title: Spiko links EU regulated T-bill funds to Coinbase stablecoin rails
entries.snippet: Spiko integrated Coinbase Payments into two EU regulated UCITS Treasury funds, enabling USDC and EURC subscriptions and redemption payments through Base.
entries.tweet_text: Spiko links EU regulated T-bill funds to @coinbase stablecoin rails

entries.title: RedotPay selects OpenPayd for stablecoin payments
entries.snippet: RedotPay, a global stablecoin-based payment fintech, has selected OpenPayd, a leading financial infrastructure provider, to enhance its treasury operations, multi-currency payments, and cross-border remittances for customers worldwide.

entries.title: Qliro becomes PPRO's Nordic BNPL partner
entries.snippet: Qliro AB (publ) ("Qliro") today announced that it has partnered with PPRO, the leading local payments platform. Through this exclusive partnership, Qliro becomes the only BNPL provider available to PPRO's network of payment service providers (PSPs) and merchants across Sweden, Norway, Finland and De

entries.title: Axiology goes live on blockchain Canton
entries.snippet: Axiology is now operating as a live validator node on Canton network, the privacy-enabled blockchain network used by a significant share of the world's regulated financial institutions for tokenisation, settlement, and asset servicing. Applications deployed on Canton can now interact directly with A

entries.title: UK sets capital, market abuse rules in landmark crypto framework
entries.snippet: The FCA finalized UK crypto rules covering capital, stablecoins and market abuse ahead of Oct. 2027 implementation.
entries.tweet_text: UK sets capital, market abuse rules in landmark crypto framework

entries.title: JPMorgan execs draw comparison between yield stablecoins and 'shadow banking'
entries.snippet: JPMorgan execs argued that stablecoin innovation can easily drift into “shadow banking” if yield payments are permitted.

entries.title: BNY and Circle expand partnership, adding mint and burn capabilities for USDC
entries.snippet: BNY, the world's largest custodian bank, said it plans to add support for additional stablecoin via its Digital Asset Custody platform.
entries.tweet_text: BNY and @circle expand partnership, adding mint and burn capabilities for USDC

entries.title: Coinbase, Kraken and OKX move to swoop up EU users affected by MiCA restrictions
entries.snippet: Several exchanges that have already been authorized by EU regulators are attempting to bring in users from companies unlicensed under the Markets in Crypto-Assets rules, offering transfer bonuses and prizes.

entries.title: Bullish receives Gibraltar approval to offer trading in tokenised securities
entries.snippet: Bullish (NYSE: BLSH), an institutionally focused global digital asset platform that provides market infrastructure and information services, today announced that it has received approval from the Gibraltar Financial Services Commission (GFSC) for tokenized securities.
entries.tweet_text: Bullish receives Gibraltar approval to offer trading in tokenised securities

entries.title: Geoswift and SKUx Debut Programmable Stablecoin Commerce Network
entries.snippet: Payments companies Geoswift and SKUx are teaming to launch a programmable stablecoin commerce network. The collaboration is designed to bridge “digital assets, traditional finance, and real-world commerce at a global scale,” the companies said in a news release provided to PYMNTS Monday (June 29). “
